title.rendered: Call for Proposals: EUNIC Spaces of Culture 2026 (up to EUR 50,000)

excerpt.rendered: Proposals are invited for the EUNIC Spaces of Culture 2026. Deadline: June 21, 2026.

content.rendered:
Call for Proposals: EUNIC Spaces of Culture 2026

Deadline: June 21, 2026

The call supports cultural relations projects and civil society partners.

Grant

  • Up to EUR 50,000 per project.

Application guidelines
